sc:name: Block-R1
sc:description: Multi-domain reinforcement learning benchmark for diffusion large language models with sample-level optimal block size annotations.
sc:citation: Block-R1: Multi-domain RL benchmark for diffusion LLMs (Yan Jiang et al.)
rai:dataLimitations: Designed for reasoning evaluation in code, math, and logic domains. Not suitable for open-domain dialogue or production deployment without adaptation.
rai:dataBiases: Bias has not been systematically evaluated. Dataset is constructed from public reasoning benchmarks and may inherit biases from source datasets.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: No personal or sensitive information is included.
rai:dataUseCases: Intended for reinforcement learning research on diffusion LLMs, specifically block-size optimisation in reasoning tasks. Not validated for safety-critical domains.
rai:dataSocialImpact: No direct societal impact expected. Potential indirect impact limited to research improvements in reasoning models.
prov:wasGeneratedBy: Aggregated from public benchmarks with RL-derived optimal block-size annotations computed via decoding block sizes maximizing reward.
